Privacy Policy

Effective date: March 7, 2026

Quran Player respects your privacy. This app allows users to download and listen to selected Quran audio files with Urdu translation. The audio files used in the app are hosted on Cloudflare.

Information We Collect

Quran Player does not require account creation, login, or user authentication. We do not collect, store, or share personal information from users.

Permissions

The app may request storage or media-related permissions only when needed to download selected Quran audio files to your device and play them offline. These permissions are used only for the app’s core functionality.

Audio Hosting and Third-Party Services

The Quran audio files are hosted and delivered using Cloudflare. Apart from this hosting and delivery service, Quran Player does not use third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services.

Data Storage

Any audio files or app settings are stored locally on your device and are not sent to us.

Children’s Privacy

This app does not knowingly collect personal information from children or any users.

Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

Contact

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us at: jarral.unit@gmail.com

© 2026 Quran Player. All rights reserved.
